title: SHOPKEEPER PROTECTION
description: Have problem with shopkeepers plugin? maybe it can help !
body:
Plugin that Helps Shopkeepers plugin to work Better (Fix Bugs)

how it works?
Start server and run command /shopkeeper reload (Below Version 2.1)
Thats simple
___
## WHY I MADE IT?
My shopkeeper Started Vanishing on 1.21
___

## What Plugin Does ?

 **Fix Vanishing and another bugs with [Shopkeepers](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/shopkeepers.80756/)**

**Fix Optimization with them**

**Culling shopkeepers**

**Fixes Logs in console**

___


### **INFORMATION**
*This Plugin Use Shopkeepers Plugin You can download it [Here](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/shopkeepers.80756/)
___
